Synthetic hand-checked fixture for the EU CRR3 SBM comparison profile.

This fixture exercises `GIRR` `CURVATURE` under `EU_CRR3` using
Regulation (EU) 2024/1623 profile-owned citation ids. It is comparison-profile
material only and is not final regulatory capital.

Single-row GIRR curvature shock fixture with EU curvature citations.
